style_effects: Dust clouds swirl violently around Charizard's limbs and feet with each movement, kicked up from cracked earth textures spreading across the ground beneath it. An intense crimson aura pulses rhythmically at its fists and talons, casting sharp red-orange light that illuminates the swirling dust particles. The lighting mood is a fierce, warm amber glow that highlights the rugged, battle-worn texture of its scales, contrasting with the gritty, motion-blurred terrain. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
